The '''Model MilBar C-427''' was a training facility designed by [[Delvin Constructs/Legends|Delvin Constructs]], that was used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. A prefabricated building, it could be set up quickly by Imperial commanders on any [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to provide a home for a limited Imperial garrison. This facility was most often used by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]]. Several companies could be housed, but because of this the barracks was quite cramped and very spartan in its accommodations.
